name: @bessel/propagator
description: Orbit propagation and TLE/OMM/OEM ingest: two-body, J2/J4 mean-element, SGP4, a DOPRI5 Cowell propagator with dense output, event detection and STM, a force model with full NxN spherical-harmonic gravity, atmospheric drag and solar radiation pressure, an Astrogator-class MCS with a differential corrector, and TEME-to-J2000
